keyInitiatives.rightDescription: Supporting enterprises through investor-friendly policies, digital governance, infrastructure development, and transparent approval systems. The Directorate of Industries & Enterprise Promotion is committed to enabling investment, accelerating industrial growth, and creating a transparent business ecosystem through progressive policies and digital governance.

login.directorateDesc: Official Pledge Portal of the Government of Uttar Pradesh, designed to promote citizen engagement and commitment towards community development and social initiatives.

about.topLabel: Building the Future of Industry in Uttar Pradesh
about.description: Access industrial incentives, land support, approvals, and financial assistance through a single digital platform designed for ease, transparency, and efficiency.

whatIsPledge.p1: PLEDGE stands for “Promoting Leadership and Enterprise for Development of Growth Engines”.
whatIsPledge.p2: A Government of Uttar Pradesh initiative under the MSME department enabling private industrial parks across all 75 districts with significant financial incentives.
whatIsPledge.p3: Promoters acquire land, develop infrastructure per government specifications, and sell/lease plots to MSMEs — all under a structured, digitally-supervised framework.

aboutBanner.heading: Promoting Leadership and Enterprise for Development of Growth Engines
aboutBanner.subtext: Fostering Leadership and Entrepreneurship to Drive the Development of Key Growth Engines

keyStakeholders.description: Our six key objectives are designed to guide our efforts and ensure success across all areas of our project.

tabs.label: PRIVATE PROMOTER
tabs.title: Private Promoter
tabs.description: An individual or company that specializes in acquiring land with the purpose of developing it into an industrial park. This entity is responsible for planning, constructing necessary infrastructure, and managing the overall development process. Once the park is fully developed, they sell or lease individual plots to various industries and businesses, facilitating their establishment within the park and supporting economic growth in the area.

tabs.label: MSME ENTERPRISES
tabs.title: MSME Enterprises
tabs.description: Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises that set up manufacturing or service units within the industrial park. They benefit from readymade infrastructure, plug-and-play facilities, and government incentives, enabling them to start operations quickly, scale production, and create local employment opportunities.

tabs.label: FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
tabs.title: Financial Institutions
tabs.description: Banks and credit agencies that provide essential funding, credit lines, and financial assistance to both the park promoters (for infrastructure development) and MSME buyers (for purchasing plots and setting up machinery), driving capital flow into the industrial ecosystem.

tabs.label: DISTRICT ADMINISTRATION
tabs.title: District Administration
tabs.description: Local administrative bodies headed by the District Magistrate and DIC (District Industries Center) officers. They facilitate land approvals, verify local compliance, oversee law and order, and provide local single-window clearance assistance to promoters and MSMEs.

tabs.label: STATE GOVERNMENT
tabs.title: State Government
tabs.description: The Government of Uttar Pradesh (MSME Department) which acts as the policy creator and regulator. They provide financial subsidies, interest rebates, stamp duty exemptions, and define the overall guidelines and standards for the PLEDGE scheme.

tabs.label: NODAL AGENCIES
tabs.title: Nodal Agencies
tabs.description: Designated state agencies responsible for reviewing project reports, assessing eligibility, hosting the digital portal, and facilitating approvals between different departments to ensure a smooth, transparent process.

schemeObjectives.description: Our six key objectives are designed to guide our efforts and ensure success across all areas of our project.

items.title: Decentralize Industrialization
items.description: Enable private sector participation in industrial park development across all districts.

items.title: Facilitate Access to Finance
items.description: Create funding schemes and incentives to support small and medium enterprises in industrial sectors.

items.title: Strengthen Infrastructure
items.description: Upgrade transportation and logistics networks to optimize supply chain efficiency.

items.title: Sustainable Manufacturing
items.description: Implement green technologies and eco-friendly practices in all industrial zones.

items.title: Enhance Workforce Skills
items.description: Develop targeted training programs to improve labor productivity and innovation capacity.

items.title: Foster Development
items.description: Encourage collaboration between industry and academia to drive technological advancements.
